Description & Application: Governs the structural use of wood, including lumber, glulam, timber poles, and diaphragms.
Covers prescriptive construction requirements for one- and two-family light-frame wood structures.
Foundational national standard for ASD and LRFD design of timber structures.
Design criteria for conventional light-frame wood construction to meet wind and seismic loads.
Standard for Performance-Rated CLT, essential for tall wood/mass timber buildings.
Design and construction standard for log structures.
Includes testing and evaluation methods such as ASTM D3957 (structural logs) and ASTM D7672 (rim boards).
Standards for preservative treatment and use of wood poles, piles, and lumber in permanent installations.
